stem: In a circle with center O, arc XY is subtended by a central angle of 80°. The length of arc XY is 12 inches. What is the length, in inches, of the major arc XY (the arc not subtended by the 80° angle)?
rationale: The major arc is subtended by a central angle of 360° − 80° = 280°. Arc lengths are proportional to central angles, so the major arc length is 12 × (280/80) = 12 × 3.5 = 42 inches.
